basic_details.job_title: ESIC PMU Interview Schedule 2026 - Dates, Venue, Roll Numbers and Candidate List
basic_details.organization_name: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC), Ministry of Labour & Employment
basic_details.short_information: The Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) has released the interview schedule for the engagement of professionals in the Project Management Unit (PMU) of its ICT Division. As per the official notice dated 3 July 2026, interviews for 111 provisionally eligible candidates across 23 technical positions will be held from 23 July 2026 to 25 July 2026 at the ESIC Directorate (Medical), Mayur Vihar Phase-I, New Delhi. This article covers the complete schedule, position-wise vacancy details, venue information, required documents, and answers to frequently asked questions.

important_dates.raw: This section summarizes the essential logistical details every shortlisted candidate needs to know before attending the interview. | Interviews for all 23 PMU positions will be conducted over three consecutive days, with the schedule varying position-wise. The key details are as follows: | Interview Dates: 23 July 2026 to 25 July 2026 Reporting Time: 9:30 AM Venue: Directorate (Medical) Delhi, 3rd Floor, ESIC Dispensary-cum-Diagnostic Centre Complex, Mayur Vihar Phase-I, New Delhi-110091 Reference Number: F. No. A-12027/4/2026-EXAM, dated 03/07/2026 Issuing Authority: Jt. Director (Recruitment), ESIC Interview Language: Candidates may choose either Hindi or English | ESIC has stated that interview call letters have already been sent to eligible candidates via email. Candidates whose names appear in the eligibility list but who have not received a call letter are still permitted to report directly at the venue on their scheduled date and time, along with the required documents.

important_instructions: This section highlights the key rules and conditions candidates must be aware of before the interview date.

rows.information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC), Ministry of Labour & Employment
Engagement of professionals for PMU, ICT Division (full-time, fixed-term contractual)
Directorate (Medical) Delhi, 3rd Floor, ESIC Dispensary-cum-Diagnostic Centre Complex, Mayur Vihar Phase-I, New Delhi-110091
Interviewed only once for all positions

content_sections.heading: What Is the ESIC PMU ICT Division Recruitment About?
content_sections.text: This section explains the background of the recruitment notice and who it applies to. ESIC, functioning under the Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India, had advertised the engagement of professionals for the Project Management Unit (PMU) of its ICT Division on 23 February 2026. These positions are for full-time, fixed-term contractual roles covering areas such as IT operations, application development, cybersecurity, database administration, networking, infrastructure management, and vendor/procurement functions. Following the application and screening process, ESIC has now scheduled document verification and interviews for candidates found provisionally eligible.

content_sections.heading: ESIC PMU Interview Schedule 2026: Key Dates and Venue
content_sections.text: This section summarizes the essential logistical details every shortlisted candidate needs to know before attending the interview. Interviews for all 23 PMU positions will be conducted over three consecutive days, with the schedule varying position-wise. The key details are as follows: Interview Dates: 23 July 2026 to 25 July 2026 Reporting Time: 9:30 AM Venue: Directorate (Medical) Delhi, 3rd Floor, ESIC Dispensary-cum-Diagnostic Centre Complex, Mayur Vihar Phase-I, New Delhi-110091 Reference Number: F. No. A-12027/4/2026-EXAM, dated 03/07/2026 Issuing Authority: Jt. Director (Recruitment), ESIC Interview Language: Candidates may choose either Hindi or English ESIC has stated that interview call letters have already been sent to eligible candidates via email. Candidates whose names appear in the eligibility list but who have not received a call letter are still permitted to report directly at the venue on their scheduled date and time, along with the required documents.

content_sections.heading: Position-Wise Interview Schedule and Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: This section lists all 23 PMU positions along with the number of provisionally eligible candidates and their respective interview dates. A total of 111 candidates have been found provisionally eligible across the following positions: Day-Wise Breakdown of the Interview Schedule This subsection breaks down the schedule by date for quick reference. 23 July 2026: Project Director, IT Operations Lead, Applications Lead, Application Engineer (Dot Net/DB), Application Engineer (Java/DB), and SAS Administrator Engineer. 24 July 2026: System Administrator Engineer (Windows & Linux), Virtualization Engineer, Cyber Security Lead, Cyber Security Engineer (NOC/ZTNA and SIEM/SOAR/XDR), Vendor & Procurement Lead, Vendor Management Specialist, and Procurement Specialist. 25 July 2026: Infrastructure Lead, Infrastructure Engineer, Database Administrator (Production & Performance, and Backup/DR/Replication), Network & DC Lead, Networking Engineer (Data Centre and Data Recovery Centre), and Network Administrator (Load Balancer/WAF/Anti-DDoS).

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for the ESIC PMU Interview
content_sections.text: This section lists the original documents and self-attested photocopies candidates must carry to the interview venue. As per the official interview call letter, candidates must bring the following documents in original, along with at least one set of self-attested photocopies (with date): A recent passport-size photograph to be pasted on the biodata form filled at the time of interview Matriculation/10th Standard certificate or equivalent showing date of birth (or an alternative Board-issued mark sheet/school leaving certificate where applicable, as accepted for Tamil Nadu and Kerala candidates) Caste certificate/EWS certificate for candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/EWS categories, issued by the competent authority in the prescribed Government of India format. The OBC certificate must be issued within the last one year and include the non-creamy layer clause PwBD (Person with Benchmark Disability) certificate, where applicable, indicating type and percentage of disability Certificates and documents supporting the educational qualifications and experience required for the position applied for

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates Attending the Interview
content_sections.text: This section highlights the key rules and conditions candidates must be aware of before the interview date.

content_sections.heading: How to Check Your ESIC PMU Interview Call Letter Status
content_sections.text: This section explains what to do if a candidate has not received their call letter by email. ESIC has confirmed that interview call letters have been sent to eligible candidates on their registered email IDs. However, candidates whose names appear in the provisionally eligible list but who have not received the call letter via email can still report directly at the interview venue on their allotted date and time, provided they carry all the required original documents mentioned above.

content_sections.heading: Important Link
content_sections.text: Official Website: esic.gov.in Direct Link: ESIC PMU Interview Schedule 2026

faq.question: Q1. Where is the ESIC PMU interview venue located?
faq.answer: The interviews will be held at the Directorate (Medical) Delhi, 3rd Floor, ESIC Dispensary-cum-Diagnostic Centre Complex, Mayur Vihar Phase-I, New Delhi-110091.

faq.question: Q2. When are the ESIC PMU interviews scheduled in 2026?
faq.answer: The ESIC PMU ICT Division interviews are scheduled from 23 July 2026 to 25 July 2026, with the exact date depending on the position applied for.

faq.question: Q3. What is the reporting time for the ESIC PMU interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must report by 9:30 AM on their scheduled interview date.

faq.question: Q4. Where is the ESIC PMU interview venue located?
faq.answer: The interviews will be held at the Directorate (Medical) Delhi, 3rd Floor, ESIC Dispensary-cum-Diagnostic Centre Complex, Mayur Vihar Phase-I, New Delhi-110091.

faq.question: Q5. How many candidates are eligible for the ESIC PMU interview?
faq.answer: A total of 111 candidates have been found provisionally eligible across 23 different positions in the ESIC PMU ICT Division.
